title: senecio cordifolius var. neaei
intro: Senecio cordifolius var. neaei, also known as New Zealand groundsel, is a perennial herb native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senecio cordifolius var. neaei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain pathogens. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity and the need for proper dosage and preparation.
